hero.title: I build web products where engineering meets real-world needs.
hero.intro: Full-stack developer at C&C Apple Premium Partner and Computer Science MSc student (AI track). I work on products born from real-world needs, like Ospitio.

work.title: Personal work
work.intro: Products I designed, built and — in some cases — use myself. Each case study explains the problem, architecture and the technical decisions behind it.
work.index_description: Personal projects by Tommaso Valenzano — Ospitio, Room N14 and more.
work.empty: Personal project case studies coming soon.

about.title: About
about.meta_description: Tommaso Valenzano — full-stack developer at C&C Apple Premium Partner, Computer Science MSc student (AI track), building products like Ospitio.
about.bio_1: I'm Tommaso Valenzano. I work as a full-stack developer at C&C Apple Premium Partner and I'm completing my MSc in Computer Science (AI track) at Università degli Studi di Bari Aldo Moro, where I already earned my BSc in Computer Science & Software Production Technologies.
about.bio_2: I build personal products like Ospitio and Room N14 — projects born from concrete needs that I also use as a playground for the stack. This portfolio is one of them.
now_items: Full-stack on Nuxt + NestJS at work
Ospitio — a management SaaS for Italian accommodations
MSc in AI, focused on LLMs and formal methods
Writing on this portfolio whenever I learn something worth telling
about.contact_description: Drop me an email or find me on LinkedIn. Happy to reply in English or Italian.
